tracks.meaning: the rate at which energy is transferred or work is done, measured in watts
the ability or capacity to do something or make something happen
legal or official authority to act or make decisions on behalf of someone else
the military strength or armed forces of a nation
electrical energy supplied to a device or system
the strength or influence of a company or organization in its market
